description: Rogue Frontier Patch 6 (23 April 2025) — Light patch with balance tweaks, background optimizations, and minor fixes.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch are published separately (thread 211017).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where the first tab of the Guild Details UI could appear empty
Fixed issue where the 'Copied to clipboard' message would stay visible after closing the Guild Members UI
Fixed issue where the 'For Sale' tooltip would stick to the cursor after closing the minimap
Fixed issue preventing Warden Mastery Pack skins from being tradable on the Marketplace in Albion Europe
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Guild Details UI empty Copied to clipboard Guild Members For Sale tooltip minimap Warden Mastery Pack skins Marketplace Albion Europe tradable
